capture_metadata.notes: apiyi_cc cross-object citation interleaving and warning citation ordering batch

diagnostics.message: Separator Vapor Outlet is not connected to any downstream consumer or export sink.
Trim Cooler outlet condition may still shift after the downstream sink is restored, so the cooler should remain explanatory context only.
Trim Separator behavior cannot be treated as independently settled while the vapor outlet remains disconnected.

payload.system:
你是 RadishMind 的候选编辑提案推理器，只处理 `radishflow / suggest_flowsheet_edits`。

输出要求：

1. 只输出一个 JSON 对象，结构必须满足 `CopilotResponse`
2. 不要输出 markdown 代码块，不要输出 JSON 之外的解释
3. `project` 固定回写为 `radishflow`
4. `task` 固定回写为 `suggest_flowsheet_edits`
5. `proposed_actions` 里的动作只能是 `candidate_edit`
6. 只允许输出“最小、可审查、非执行式”的 patch，不要声称已经改图或已经执行
7. 只使用当前输入里的诊断、`FlowsheetDocument`、选择集和快照；不要凭空发明外部证据
8. 只要存在 `candidate_edit`，整体 `requires_confirmation` 必须为 `true`，且每条 `candidate_edit.requires_confirmation` 也必须为 `true`
9. 证据不足时允许 `status=partial`，但仍应把 patch 限制在当前被选中且有直接诊断支撑的局部对象上
10. `citations` 应优先保持稳定顺序：直接诊断在前，目标对象 artifact 其次，supporting snapshot 最后

字段提醒：

- `answers` 至少 1 条
- `summary` 必须先说明当前围绕哪个对象或哪类问题生成候选提案
- `issues` 只写真正触发 patch 的诊断或约束，不要泛泛重复摘要
- `proposed_actions` 至少 1 条，且每条都必须包含 `title`、`target`、`rationale`、`patch`、`risk_level`、`requires_confirmation`
- `target` 只能指向当前请求里有证据支撑的 `stream` 或 `unit`
- `patch` 优先使用 `spec_placeholders`、`parameter_placeholders`、`parameter_updates`、`connection_placeholder` 这类局部结构
- `confidence` 使用 0 到 1 之间的小数

风险规则：

- 拓扑重连、删除对象、替换关键包或其他显著改变求解行为的建议应标为 `high`
- 常规规格补全、局部参数修正或保护性占位通常标为 `medium`
- 不要把高风险拓扑修改伪装成低风险设置调整

引用规则：

- 诊断通常使用 `diag-<n>`
- 目标对象在 `flowsheet_document` 中的 artifact 引用通常使用 `flowdoc-stream-<n>` 或 `flowdoc-unit-<n>`
- supporting snapshot 通常使用 `snapshot-1`
- 若单条 `issue` 或 `candidate_edit` 同时引用多条证据，也应保持 `diagnostic -> artifact -> snapshot` 顺序

content.text: {"schema_version":1,"request_id":"rf-suggest-edit-cross-object-warning-citation-ordering-001","project":"radishflow","task":"suggest_flowsheet_edits","locale":"zh-CN","status":"partial","requires_confirmation":true,"answers":[{"summary":"当前围绕 Trim Separator（separator-4）的蒸汽出口流股 separator-vapor-41 未连接下游消费者或出口汇，导致拓扑无效（solver_status=invalid_topology）。两条 warning 分别指出 Cooler Outlet 条件在下游恢复前不可视为最终值、Separator 行为在蒸汽出口断开期间不可视为独立收敛。以下候选提案聚焦于：① 为断开的蒸汽出口添加连接占位，② 将 Separator 压力模式切换为显式设定以稳定局部求解。","issues":[{"description":"separator-vapor-41 未连接任何下游单元或出口汇，造成拓扑断裂，求解器无法运行。","severity":"error","citations":["diag-1","flowdoc-stream-3","snapshot-1"]},{"description":"separator-4 在蒸汽出口断开状态下行为不可独立收敛，pressure_mode=free 进一步放大了不确定性。","severity":"warning","citations":["diag-3","flowdoc-unit-2","snapshot-1"]},{"description":"cooler-outlet-41 的出口条件在下游恢复前可能漂移，当前仅作解释性上下文保留。","severity":"warning","citations":["diag-2","flowdoc-stream-2"]}],"proposed_actions":[{"action":"candidate_edit","title":"为 Separator Vapor Outlet 添加下游连接占位","target":{"type":"stream","id":"separator-vapor-41"},"rationale":"separator-vapor-41 当前无 target_unit_id，是拓扑断裂的直接原因。添加 connection_placeholder 标记该流股需要一个下游消费者或出口汇，供用户在确认后补全实际连接目标。","patch":{"connection_placeholder":{"stream_id":"separator-vapor-41","direction":"downstream","placeholder_label":"待指定下游消费者或出口汇","required":true}},"risk_level":"high","requires_confirmation":true,"citations":["diag-1","flowdoc-stream-3","snapshot-1"]},{"action":"candidate_edit","title":"将 Trim Separator 压力模式从 free 切换为 specified 并设定占位压力","target":{"type":"unit","id":"separator-4"},"rationale":"当前 pressure_mode=free 依赖上下游完整拓扑来推算操作压力；在蒸汽出口断开期间，切换为 specified 并以蒸汽出口已有的 146 kPa 作为占位值，可使 Separator 在局部拓扑修复前具备确定的操作压力，减少求解不确定性。该值仅为占位，待拓扑恢复后用户应重新评估是否回退为 free。","patch":{"parameter_updates":[{"path":"units[separator-4].config.pressure_mode","old_value":"free","new_value":"specified"},{"path":"units[separator-4].config.operating_pressure_kpa","old_value":null,"new_value":146}],"parameter_placeholders":[{"path":"units[separator-4].config.operating_pressure_kpa","placeholder_label":"占位值取自 separator-vapor-41 现有 pressure_kpa=146，待拓扑恢复后复核"}]},"risk_level":"medium","requires_confirmation":true,"citations":["diag-3","flowdoc-unit-2","flowdoc-stream-3","snapshot-1"]}],"confidence":0.62,"citations":[{"id":"diag-1","label":"诊断 STREAM_DISCONNECTED（separator-vapor-41）","source":"diagnostics[0]"},{"id":"diag-2","label":"诊断 COOLER_OUTLET_EFFECT_UNCONFIRMED（cooler-outlet-41）","source":"diagnostics[1]"},{"id":"diag-3","label":"诊断 DOWNSTREAM_SEPARATOR_STATE_DEPENDENT（separator-4）","source":"diagnostics[2]"},{"id":"flowdoc-stream-2","label":"Cooler Outlet 流股定义（cooler-outlet-41）","source":"flowsheet_document.streams[1]"},{"id":"flowdoc-stream-3","label":"Separator Vapor Outlet 流股定义（separator-vapor-41）","source":"flowsheet_document.streams[2]"},{"id":"flowdoc-unit-2","label":"Trim Separator 单元定义（separator-4）","source":"flowsheet_document.units[1]"},{"id":"snapshot-1","label":"最新求解快照（solver_status=invalid_topology）","source":"context.latest_snapshot"}]}]}

answers.text: 当前围绕 Trim Separator（separator-4）的蒸汽出口流股 separator-vapor-41 未连接下游消费者或出口汇，导致拓扑无效（solver_status=invalid_topology）。两条 warning 分别指出 Cooler Outlet 条件在下游恢复前不可视为最终值、Separator 行为在蒸汽出口断开期间不可视为独立收敛。以下候选提案聚焦于：① 为断开的蒸汽出口添加连接占位，② 将 Separator 压力模式切换为显式设定以稳定局部求解。

proposed_actions.title: 为 Separator Vapor Outlet 添加下游连接占位
proposed_actions.rationale: separator-vapor-41 当前无 target_unit_id，是拓扑断裂的直接原因。添加 connection_placeholder 标记该流股需要一个下游消费者或出口汇，供用户在确认后补全实际连接目标。

Trim Cooler outlet condition may still shift after the downstream sink is restored, so the cooler should remain explanatory context only.
Trim Separator behavior cannot be treated as independently settled while the vapor outlet remains disconnected.

response.summary: 当前围绕 Trim Separator（separator-4）的蒸汽出口流股 separator-vapor-41 未连接下游消费者或出口汇，导致拓扑无效（solver_status=invalid_topology）。两条 warning 分别指出 Cooler Outlet 条件在下游恢复前不可视为最终值、Separator 行为在蒸汽出口断开期间不可视为独立收敛。以下候选提案聚焦于：① 为断开的蒸汽出口添加连接占位，② 将 Separator 压力模式切换为显式设定以稳定局部求解。
